problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: Topological insulator surface state conduction may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
